remarks: A rare opportunity to own a 2018-built stand-alone townhouse condo that lives like a single family home - thoughtfully designed, impeccably finished, low maintenance and move-in ready.  KEY HIGHLIGHTS 2018 construction with luxury finishes - hardwood floors, marble countertops, custom built-ins throughout Chef's kitchen with premium stainless appliances, marble island, subway tile backsplash Butler's pantry with wine fridge and glass-front cabinetry - perfect for entertaining Grand primary suite - 17'6"14'7" bedroom, walk-in closet, spa bath with soaking tub & glass shower Finished basement with dedicated guest suite plus flexible family room & office space Private fenced backyard with bluestone patio and professional landscaping 1-car garage plus 2 additional outdoor parking spaces - total 3 spots
